paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.65, representing an increase of 8.66% from the prior close, but a decrease of 25.86% over the last 21 trading sessions.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the headline "RCS - Fermi Inc. - Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date" from TradingView, announcing that Fermi Inc. will host an earnings call on August 13, 2026.

Recent SEC filings include an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, as well as an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, with total net proceeds of approximately $416.81 million. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
